title: EWADomainResult
description: Structured output from a domain specialist agent analyzing assigned SAP EWA chapters. Recommendation-first model: each finding is grounded in a SAP advisory, then paired with the observed condition and its impact.

findings.description: Actionable findings derived from SAP recommendations in the EWA report.

source_chapter.description: Chapter and subsection where this finding originates, e.g. '11.2 ABAP Stack of SHP'.

title.description: Short descriptive title of the finding.

finding.description: The observed condition or configuration that SAP's recommendation addresses.

impact.description: Technical or business consequence if this finding is not actioned.

recommendation.description: SAP's explicit recommended action, quoted or closely paraphrased from the report.

parameters.description: Configuration parameters with an explicit SAP-recommended value change.

param_name.description: Name of the SAP parameter or configuration item.

current_value.description: Current value as reported in the EWA.

recommended_value.description: SAP-recommended value as stated in the report.

abstentions.description: Chapters or sections with no actionable recommendations or where data is unreadable.

reason.description: Reason the section was not analyzed.
